languages.text: "Оставим любезности тем, у кого есть на них время. Вы только прибыли, но производите впечатление человека смышленого и, судя по всему, рветесь проявить себя. А у меня как раз есть срочное дело. Мы ожидали не вас, а союзную армию рода Гапрак. Выясните, что с ней сталось и, быть может, я поверю, что вы на нашей стороне".
languages.translation_comment:
Выдаем Obj1_WhereIsGaprak
Стартует DL_LariaAskToFindGaprak
стартуем DL_KnowGaprakPass

стартуем DL_KnowGaprakPass

languages.text: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."
languages.original_text: "Оставим любезности тем, у кого есть на них время. Вы только прибыли, но производите впечатление человека смышленого и, судя по всему, рветесь проявить себя. А у меня как раз есть срочное дело. Мы ожидали не вас, а союзную армию рода Гапрак. Выясните, что с ней сталось и, быть может, я поверю, что вы на нашей стороне".

However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."

languages.text: “客套话就留给那些有闲工夫的人吧。你虽然刚到，但我看你像是个聪明人，而且似乎很想做出点成绩。不过，我眼下有急事要处理。我们等的不是你，而是贾帕克家的军队。去查清楚那支援军究竟出了什么事，到那时候，我或许就会相信你是站在我们这边的。”
languages.original_text: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."

traits.locale_text: “客套话就留给那些有闲工夫的人吧。你虽然刚到，但我看你像是个聪明人，而且似乎很想做出点成绩。不过，我眼下有急事要处理。我们等的不是你，而是贾帕克家的军队。去查清楚那支援军究竟出了什么事，到那时候，我或许就会相信你是站在我们这边的。”

languages.text: « Laissons les ronds de jambe à ceux qui ont du temps à perdre. Vous venez à peine de débarquer, mais vous m'avez l'air habile, et avide d'apporter votre pierre à l'édifice. Pour l'heure, le devoir m'appelle. Ce n'est pas vous que nous attendions, mais l'armée de la maison Gaprak. Découvrez ce qui lui est arrivé, et peut-être me laisserai-je convaincre que vous êtes de notre côté. »
languages.original_text: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."

traits.locale_text: « Laissons les ronds de jambe à ceux qui ont du temps à perdre. Vous venez à peine de débarquer, mais vous m'avez l'air habile, et avide d'apporter votre pierre à l'édifice. Pour l'heure, le devoir m'appelle. Ce n'est pas vous que nous attendions, mais l'armée de la maison Gaprak. Découvrez ce qui lui est arrivé, et peut-être me laisserai-je convaincre que vous êtes de notre côté. »

languages.text: "Süslü sözleri vakti olanlara bırakalım. Yeni gelmiş olmanıza rağmen zeki biri olduğunuz anlaşılıyor. Kendinizi kanıtlamaya da hevesli gibisiniz. Ancak ilgilenmem gereken acil işler var. Sizi değil de Gaprak Hanesi'nin ordusunu bekliyorduk. O orduya ne olduğunu öğrenin, belki o zaman dostumuz olduğunuza inanırım."
languages.original_text: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."

traits.locale_text: "Süslü sözleri vakti olanlara bırakalım. Yeni gelmiş olmanıza rağmen zeki biri olduğunuz anlaşılıyor. Kendinizi kanıtlamaya da hevesli gibisiniz. Ancak ilgilenmem gereken acil işler var. Sizi değil de Gaprak Hanesi'nin ordusunu bekliyorduk. O orduya ne olduğunu öğrenin, belki o zaman dostumuz olduğunuza inanırım."

languages.text: «Dejemos las cortesías para quienes tengan tiempo para ellas. Acaba de llegar, pero me parece una persona inteligente y está decidid{mf|o|a} a dejar huella. Sin embargo, tengo asuntos urgentes que atender. No l{mf|e|a} esperábamos a usted, sino al ejército de la casa Gaprak. Descubra qué ha sido de él y quizá entonces crea de verdad que está de nuestro lado».
languages.original_text: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."

traits.locale_text: «Dejemos las cortesías para quienes tengan tiempo para ellas. Acaba de llegar, pero me parece una persona inteligente y está decidid{mf|o|a} a dejar huella. Sin embargo, tengo asuntos urgentes que atender. No l{mf|e|a} esperábamos a usted, sino al ejército de la casa Gaprak. Descubra qué ha sido de él y quizá entonces crea de verdad que está de nuestro lado».

languages.text: "Überlassen wir die Höflichkeiten denen, die dafür Zeit haben. Ihr seid gerade erst eingetroffen, scheint mir aber ein kluger Kopf und entschlossen zu sein, Euch zu profilieren. Allerdings muss ich mich um dringende Angelegenheiten kümmern. Wir hatten nicht Euch, sondern die Armee von Haus Gaprak erwartet. Findet heraus, was ihr zugestoßen ist, dann glaube ich vielleicht, dass Ihr auf unserer Seite steht."
languages.original_text: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."

traits.locale_text: "Überlassen wir die Höflichkeiten denen, die dafür Zeit haben. Ihr seid gerade erst eingetroffen, scheint mir aber ein kluger Kopf und entschlossen zu sein, Euch zu profilieren. Allerdings muss ich mich um dringende Angelegenheiten kümmern. Wir hatten nicht Euch, sondern die Armee von Haus Gaprak erwartet. Findet heraus, was ihr zugestoßen ist, dann glaube ich vielleicht, dass Ihr auf unserer Seite steht."

languages.text: 「お世辞は時間がある人にお任せしましょう。あなたは到着したばかりですが、賢い方だと感じますし、活躍したいという意欲も感じます。しかし、私は緊急の用事があります。あなたたちを待っていたわけではありません。むしろ、ガプラク家の軍勢を待っていました。その軍勢の行方を探し、その結果を私に伝えれば、あなたたちが味方であると信じるかもしれません。」
languages.original_text: "Let's leave the pleasantries to those who have time for them. You have only just arrived, but you strike me as an intelligent sort, and you seem eager to make your mark. However, I have urgent business to attend to. We weren't expecting you, but rather the House Gaprak army. Find out what happened to it, and perhaps then I'll believe you are on our side."

traits.locale_text: 「お世辞は時間がある人にお任せしましょう。あなたは到着したばかりですが、賢い方だと感じますし、活躍したいという意欲も感じます。しかし、私は緊急の用事があります。あなたたちを待っていたわけではありません。むしろ、ガプラク家の軍勢を待っていました。その軍勢の行方を探し、その結果を私に伝えれば、あなたたちが味方であると信じるかもしれません。」
